_comment: Environment-conditional STIG findings. Mark N/A based on what infrastructure exists.

hasADCS.reason: AD CS STIG findings only apply when CA role is installed

hasFTP.reason: FTP STIG findings only apply when FTP is installed

hasSplitDNS.reason: DNS forwarder restrictions apply to split-DNS architectures

hasSmartCard.reason: MFA/smart card findings require hardware + PKI enrollment

hasLAPS.description: LAPS deployed (Windows LAPS or legacy LAPS)
hasLAPS.reason: LAPS findings require org-level LAPS deployment

hasMultipleDCs.reason: DC redundancy check only applies to multi-DC environments

hasSIEM.reason: Log forwarding findings require SIEM infrastructure

hasAppLocker.reason: Application control findings require AppLocker/WDAC policy

hasBackup.reason: Backup findings require organizational backup infrastructure

hasFIM.reason: FIM findings require file integrity monitoring solution

notes: V-205848 (TPM): Must enable vTPM in hypervisor settings
V-205857 (Secure Boot): Requires Gen2 VM + Secure Boot enabled
V-205864 (VBS): Requires Gen2 VM + Secure Boot + vTPM
